name: Mom's Ginger "Barbecued" Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, mix together the tomato paste, mustard, soy sauce, and liquid smoke.
2. Fill the tomato paste can 1/2 full with wine vinegar; add the ginger and blend in.
3. Add dark brown sugar until you achieve your desired balance of sweet and sour flavors. If needed, thin the mixture with water so it is slightly thinner than catsup.
4. Clean and cut the chicken into pieces. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Broil the chicken lightly on both sides in a deep pan.
6. Remove from heat and de-skin the chicken.
7. Spoon the sauce over the chicken.
8. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for about 45 minutes, turning the chicken over halfway through the cooking time.
